text: basis that the merchant requires a minimum or maximum amount on a Visa debit card, or requires that the purchase amount on a credit card is greater than US$10, please notify your Visa card issuer. * Please note, Visa does not set up, service or have access to cardholder or merchant accounts. This is done through our client financial institutions (the banks). Each financial institution has its own criteria for issuing Visa cards, how it manages statements, etc. Get in touch Report a lost card by calling Visa at 000-800-100-1219.
